[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Chinese police investigate parents after toddler seen crying in a cage in video | South China Morning Post
[METADATA/INTRO]: Chinese police investigate parents after toddler seen crying in a cage in video - Officers say the father told them he had set up the video and other photos and sent them to his ex-wife to make her angry...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Chinese police investigate parents after toddler seen crying in a cage in video 
 - Officers say the father told them he had set up the video and other photos and sent them to his ex-wife to make her angry 
 - The 20-month-old girl is in police care and was not found to have any injuries 
 Police are investigating the parents of a 20-month-old girl in southern China after a video showing the toddler crying in a cage was circulated on social media. 
 Other images shared online appeared to show the girl with multiple bruises on her limbs, and one apparently showed a man putting his foot on her face as she lay on the floor.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021-02-10
[TITLE]: Popular Pet Store In Malaysia Called Out For Allegedly Neglecting Puppies In Cages
[METADATA/INTRO]: Popular Pet Store In Malaysia Called Out For Allegedly Neglecting Puppies In Cages The pet store has since responded in a statement to SAYS....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Popular Pet Store In Malaysia Called Out For Allegedly Neglecting Puppies In Cages 
 The pet store has since responded in a statement to SAYS. 
 A popular pet store at a mall in Petaling Jaya is facing allegations for recently neglecting its puppies in cages 
 In a post yesterday, 10 February, Facebook user Ann Salmon shared photos of Petsmore in 1 Utama Shopping Centre that were taken on 8 February. 
 Tagging SPCA Selangor, she wrote, "[At] approximately 1pm to 2pm. These barely two-month-old pups [were] brought in. No water in bowls. No cloth/rags on wires. No toy. With CNY holidays coming up. I can imagine these pups being neglected. Took it up with the store man. He gave many lame excuses. Please check."
